title: MCP — Model Context Protocol
description: Connect agents to external tools, databases, and services through the Model Context Protocol

lessons.title: What Is MCP?
lessons.description: Understanding the Model Context Protocol and why it's the USB-C of AI agents

lessons.title: MCP Architecture

lessons.description: Connecting agents to databases, GitHub, Jira, and other services via existing MCP servers

lessons.description: Hands-on: building a custom MCP server that exposes your domain tools to agents

lessons.title: MCP in Production
lessons.description: Security, authentication, performance, and deployment patterns for MCP servers
